LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JTX TAX, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED SUFFICIENT FACTS DEMONSTRATING AN ACTUAL AND PRESENT CONTROVERSY EXISTS OVER THE ENFORCEABILITY OF POST TERMINATION COVENANTS NOT TO COMPETE OR SOLICIT. DEFENDANT WAS GIVEN 20 DAYS LEAVE TO FILE AN ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT JTX TAX, INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LEE, BENJAMIN B.O.L. GLOBAL, INC. ROES 1 THROUGH 100
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY JTX TAX, INC.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Req.'S And Deft'S Attendance At Deposition And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Amit Kurlekar, Esq. of Kaufhold Gaskin LLP, Tel. 415.676.9036, for plaintiff and moving party;
Timothy S. Fox, Esq. of Lee Tran & Liang LLP, Tel. 213.612.8902, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN LEE'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And Defendant's Attendance At Deposition And Request For Sanctions is taken under submission. The parties are to submit a joint stipulation. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Disco Requests
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Amit Kurlekar, Esq. of Kaufhold Gaskin LLP, Tel. 415.676.9036, for plaintiff and moving party;
Timothy S. Fox, Esq. of Lee Tran & Liang LLP, Tel. 213.612.8902, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN LEE'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests is taken under submission. The parties are to submit a joint stipulation. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RUTH HAWLEY OF KAUFHOLD GASKIN LLP, TEL. NO. 944-9409 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. TIMOTHY FOX OF LTL TRIAL ATTORNEYS, TEL. NO. (213) 612-3737 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JTX TAX, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff has alleged sufficient facts demonstrating an actual and present controversy exists over the enforceability of post termination covenants not to compete or solicit. DEFENDANT WAS GIVEN 20 DAYS LEAVE TO FILE AN ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
